name: Honey Beef with Pineapple Salsa
recipeIngredient: 185 grams snow pea pods, fresh, trimmed
1/2 fresh pineapple, peeled, cored, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat.
2. Add sesame seeds and garlic. Stir fry for 2 minutes or until the seeds are golden. Remove from the wok and set aside.
3. Add beef to the wok. Stir fry for 2 minutes or until brown.
4. Add snow peas, honey, oyster sauce, and soy sauce.
5. Return the sesame seed mixture to the wok. Stir fry for 3 minutes or until the sauce thickens.
6. To make the salsa, place pineapple, sugar, chives, lime juice, and chili in a bowl. Toss to combine.
7. Serve with beef.
